name: Tuna Pasta Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Uncooked pasta (your kid's favorite shape)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook pasta according to package directions; drain.
2. Cook peas according to package directions; drain.
3. Mix all ingredients together in a bowl until well combined.
4. Keep the salad refrigerated or store it in a cool, insulated lunch box until ready to eat.
